product_updates.title: Jack Dorsey just halved the size of Block’s employee base — and he says your company is next
product_updates.content: Jack Dorsey has long been an open admirer of Elon Musk. Now, it seems, he may have been taking notes.

product_updates.title: Anthropic CEO stands firm as Pentagon deadline looms
product_updates.content: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said Thursday that he "cannot in good conscience accede" to the Pentagon's demands to give the military unrestricted access to its AI systems.

product_updates.title: So, we’re getting Prada Meta AI glasses, right?
product_updates.content: Mark Zuckerberg was at Prada's fashion week event in Milan, leaving everyone to wonder if we're getting Meta AI glasses under the Prada brand.

product_updates.title: Sophia Space raises $10M seed to demo novel space computers
product_updates.content: The company's modular computer tiles offer a new vision for space data centers.

product_updates.title: Mistral AI inks a deal with global consulting giant Accenture
product_updates.content: Mistral AI lands a partnership with Accenture, the consultant that has also recently announced partnerships with rivals OpenAI and Anthropic.

product_updates.title: Read AI launches an email-based ‘digital twin’ to help you with schedules and answers
product_updates.content: Read AI is launching Ada, which can reply with your availability and extract answers from the company knowledge base and the web.

product_updates.title: Bumble adds AI-powered photo feedback and profile guidance tools
product_updates.content: Bumble and other popular dating apps, like Match Group's Tinder and Hinge, have all embraced AI-powered features.

product_updates.title: Google launches Nano Banana 2 model with faster image generation
product_updates.content: Google is making Nano Banana 2 a default model in Gemini app and in AI mode.

product_updates.title: 2 days left: Lock in the best discounts for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
product_updates.content: Register now to secure discounts of up to $680 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass. Offer ends tomorrow, February 27, at 11:59 p.m. PT.

product_updates.title: Exhibit in Boston’s startup ecosystem at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026
product_updates.content: On June 9, over 1,000 founders, investors, and decision-makers will gather for TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. This isn’t just foot traffic. It’s a full day of concentrated deal flow.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Nano Banana 2: Combining Pro capabilities with lightning-fast speed
technical_breakthroughs.content: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.

technical_breakthroughs.title: New AirSnitch attack bypasses Wi-Fi encryption in homes, offices, and enterprises
technical_breakthroughs.content: That guest network you set up for your neighbors may not be as secure as you think.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Finding value with AI and Industry 5.0 transformation
technical_breakthroughs.content: For years, Industry 4.0 transformation has centered on the convergence of intelligent technologies like AI, cloud, the internet of things, robotics, and digital twins. technical_breakthroughs.title: America was winning the race to find Martian life. Then China jumped in.
technical_breakthroughs.content: To most people, rocks are just rocks. To geologists, they are much, much more: crystal-filled time capsules with the power to reveal the state of the planet at the very moment they were forged.
